title: pyrus glutinosa
intro: Pyrus glutinosa, also known as the Korean mountain ash or Chinese pear, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The bark, leaves, and fruit of Pyrus glutinosa have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits associated with Pyrus glutinosa include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Pyrus glutinosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Korean medicine to create decoctions and salves for topical application.
